allow: Bash(sort -u node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const j = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('locales/ru.json','utf8'\)\); const flat = {}; function walk\(obj, p\) { for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(obj\)\) { const key = p ? p + '.' + k : k; if \(Array.isArray\(v\)\) { v.forEach\(\(_, i\) => flat[key + '.' + i] = true\); flat[key] = true; } else if \(v && typeof v === 'object'\) walk\(v, key\); else flat[key] = true; } } walk\(j, ''\); const codeKeys = fs.readFileSync\('code_keys.txt', 'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); const missing = codeKeys.filter\(k => !flat[k]\); console.log\('TOTAL_IN_CODE=' + codeKeys.length\); console.log\('MISSING_IN_JSON=' + missing.length\); missing.forEach\(k => console.log\(' - ' + k\)\); " rm -f ./code_keys.txt)

Bash(sort -u node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const j = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('locales/ru.json','utf8'\)\); const flatByType = new Map\(\); function walk\(obj, p\) { for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(obj\)\) { const key = p ? p + '.' + k : k; if \(Array.isArray\(v\)\) { flatByType.set\(key,'array'\); v.forEach\(\(_, i\)=>flatByType.set\(key+'.'+i,'string'\)\); } else if \(v && typeof v === 'object'\) { flatByType.set\(key,'object'\); walk\(v, key\); } else flatByType.set\(key,'string'\); } } walk\(j, ''\); const codeKeys = fs.readFileSync\('code_keys.txt','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); const bad = []; for \(const k of codeKeys\) { const t = flatByType.get\(k\); if \(!t\) bad.push\({k, t:'MISSING'}\); else if \(t !== 'string'\) bad.push\({k, t}\); } console.log\('non-string-leaf keys used in code:'\); bad.forEach\(x => console.log\(' ' + x.t + ' : ' + x.k\)\); " rm -f ./code_keys.txt)
